visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Outdoor airport environment at night. Two young women in casual attire (black tank top and brown jacket) stand by a dark vehicle, excitedly holding a large red horizontal banner. The banner features photos of a man and two young children alongside colorful graphic icons. (2) Interior airport terminal lobby. A large crowd of fans, many wearing pink and blue cone-shaped party hats, are cheering, waving their hands, and filming with smartphones. A person wearing a white tracksuit and a white cap sprints through the frame at high speed, pushing a black stroller. (3) Handheld tracking shot following the runner in white through the terminal. The camera shakes as it captures the child in the stroller, who is leaning back and laughing. Fans try to follow but are quickly outpaced. (4) A woman in a white shirt is seen running while carrying a large white cardboard cutout of a human figure wearing a party hat, appearing flustered. (5) The runner in white reaches an outdoor taxi stand and quickly maneuvers the stroller toward a yellow taxi waiting at the curb. (6) Close-up shot of the young boy in the stroller; he has short black hair, wears a white t-shirt, and has a wide, joyous expression while looking into the camera during the fast movement. (7) Static display shot of a decorated birthday cake with a Dragon Ball Z theme (Goku figure) and "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" text. A small white dog is held in the background by an unidentified person. (8) Dimly lit interior of a car at night. A man and the young boy are seated in the back, both smiling broadly and flashing peace signs at the camera. (9) Wide group photo in the airport terminal. Over twenty people, including the main man and woman, pose together with the red banner and various birthday signs, smiling and waving.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 原計劃接機機場拉布條. (2) [Logo]: hahababy. (3) [Slogan]: 恭喜hahababy 大頭佛娛樂. (4) [Slogan]: 蔡阿嘎、蔡桃貴 生日快樂. (5) [Variety]: 明星等級接機服務. (6) [Variety]: 蔡桃貴!. (7) [Variety]: 換個角度再看一次. (8) [Variety]: 等等!. (9) [Variety]: 倒帶. (10) [Variety]: 驚訝指數100%. (11) [Variety]: 混亂追逐. (12) [Variety]: 我們生日歌還沒有唱. (13) [Variety]: 溫馨畫面呢!!!. (14) [Variety]: 到底是跑去哪裡. (15) [Variety]: 此時此刻的蔡氏父子.... (16) [Subtitle]: 他們在那邊. (17) [Subtitle]: 真的喔. (18) [Subtitle]: 可是我們剛剛這樣跑一圈到這邊, 然後再從這邊走. (19) [Subtitle]: 對啊, 跑了一整圈. (20) [Subtitle]: 他們還在那邊. (21) [Variety]: 加速逃跑. (22) [Subtitle]: 我先回去把蛋糕吃光. (23) [Variety]: 小壽星好快樂. (24) [Variety]: 但是... 蛋糕在機場啊. (25) [Variety]: 真的快跑回家了....... (26) [Subtitle]: 耶, 我們搭上計程車了, 先回家了, 拜拜. (27) [Variety]: "追"星失敗.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult male creator, 1 child main character, approximately 20+ fans and staff members in the airport.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male with short brown hair wearing casual clothing, and a young boy in a white t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Airport terminal with check-in counters, flight info screens, and glass partitions; outdoor taxi bay with yellow vehicles and street lighting; interior of a moving taxi.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic pop music begins with a bright synth melody and a driving 4/4 electronic drum beat. (2) A sudden, loud burst of high-pitched female screaming and cheering occurs, sustained for several seconds. Underneath the voices, a rhythmic, rapid clicking sound characteristic of plastic stroller wheels rolling over a hard-tiled floor is clearly audible. (3) The acoustic environment shifts as a child's high-pitched laughter cuts through the mix, accompanied by more distant shouts and the continuous whir of the stroller. (4) A female voice speaks with rapid, breathless prosody, expressing comedic frustration in a high pitch: "我們的生日歌還沒有唱!" (5) A fast-paced ticking clock sound effect is layered over the BGM. A male voice, mid-pitched and calm, engages in a brief dialogue with the child's playful responses. (6) The background noise floor drops as the scene moves to a vehicle interior; the sound of a car engine's low hum replaces the terminal's echo. The male voice delivers a cheerful, enunciated sign-off: "耶, 我們搭上計程車了, 先回家了, 拜拜!" (7) A comedic "fail" trombone sound effect (wah-wah-wah) plays as the music ends.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video document a humorous and chaotic airport birthday surprise for a well-known creator. Instead of a traditional greeting, the target (pushing his child in a stroller) decides to sprint away, leading to a frantic chase by fans and staff. It highlights the playful family dynamics and the 'failure' of the elaborate welcome plan for comedic effect.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of 'hahababy' branding on banners and social media handles, likely the creator's own lifestyle brand.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-intensity social media vlog utilizing fast-paced editing and variety-show style captions to maximize humor.
